pages.headSubtitle: Public booking pages, synced to your calendar
pages.emptyText: No booking pages yet. Create your first page to receive appointments automatically in your calendar.
pages.confirmInfoAuto: Appointments from this page are confirmed automatically and go straight to your calendar. You can switch to "Needs approval" in the page settings.
pages.confirmInfoManual: Appointments from this page wait for your approval ("Needs attention" on the home screen) and hold the time slot until you approve or decline. You can switch to "Auto-confirm" in the page settings.
pages.copyFailed: Couldn't copy automatically — select and copy the link manually.
pages.internalNameLabel: Internal name (for identification, not shown on the page)
pages.publishHint: When off — a draft, not accessible to the public.
pages.autoConfirmHint: When off — appointments wait for manual approval.
pages.requirePaymentHint: The slot is held temporarily and confirmed only after online payment, at the meeting type's price.
pages.writeToGoogleTitle: Write confirmed appointments to my Google Calendar
pages.writeToGoogleHintConnected: Every confirmed appointment from the page (manual or automatic) is written as an event in your calendar.
pages.writeToGoogleHintDisconnected: Connect Google Calendar in "Connections" to enable.
pages.inviteClientTitle: Invite the client to the event
pages.inviteClientHint: If the client left an email — Google will send them an invitation.
pages.slugHint: A short, readable link instead of the long ID. Lowercase English letters, digits and hyphens (3–40). If empty — we'll use the ID.
pages.publishToGetLink: Publish the page to get a public link.
pages.previewHint: Here the visitor chooses a meeting type, day and time
pages.meetingTypesHint: Choose which meeting types are shown to the visitor. Each type's duration sets the appointment length in the calendar.
pages.meetingTypesEmpty: No meeting types yet. Add a new type (or via settings), or the page will offer a "Meeting" of the default length.
pages.errInternalName: Please give the page an internal name (for identification only).
pages.errSlugFormat: The short link must be 3–40 characters: lowercase English letters, digits and hyphens.
pages.errNoAvailability: No available hours defined — add at least one time window before publishing.
pages.errInvalidWindow: The availability window on {{day}} is invalid — the end time must be after the start time.
pages.errSlugTaken: This short link is already taken — please choose another.

publicPage.notFoundBody: The link may be wrong or the page is no longer active.
publicPage.thankYouDefault: Thank you! Your appointment is booked.
publicPage.noSlots: No available times right now. Please try again later.
publicPage.errSlotTaken: That time was just taken. Please choose another.
publicPage.errGeneric: Something went wrong booking the appointment. Please try again in a moment.
publicPage.payNote: Online payment is required to confirm — ₪{{amount}}. You'll be taken to Grow's secure payment page.
publicPage.paidThankYou: Payment received — your appointment is booked! See you then.
publicPage.cancelledBody: The payment wasn't completed, so the appointment wasn't booked. The slot will be released automatically soon — you can try again.
